description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, with large floor-to-ceiling windows on the main facade facing a wooden deck. The deck area includes a swimming pool, lounge chairs, an umbrella, and is surrounded by palm trees and other landscaping elements. A driveway with a parked car is visible on one side, leading to a side entrance. The house is set on a paved lot with a combination of hardscape and softscape elements, creating a luxurious and contemporary urban residence.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, pool, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Oblique view showing the pool, wooden deck, palm trees, and the main glass facade of the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the light-colored wall, driveway, and parked car, with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back wall, smaller windows, and the pool area partially obscured by palm trees.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main entry, large glass windows, pool, deck furniture, and lush landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass door, flush with the facade, and is accessed from the deck without steps or porch.
